issues.description: Action type is SearchDeck (which implies drawing into hand), but card text says 'Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of the deck in any order' — this is a scry/arrange action, not a search. SearchDeck is incorrect.
Missing context: effect should specify looking at exactly 3 cards from top of deck and arranging them (scry mechanic), not searching deck.
